edgeCases: shared-domain-edit is a no-op for roadmaps with no Baseline phase (additive predicate || isBaselinePhaseName)
coverage-set integrity: NonBacklogFeatureSet drops no schedulable feature from ValidateAnalysis/ValidateQuality
naming collision: a future schedulable phase literally named Baseline would be silently exempted (low, recorded)
draft writer refuses to clobber canonical roadmap.json and writes atomically
roadmap generate (ROADMAP.md) unaffected: mdgen has no Baseline special-casing; draft never written to canonical file
no import cycle: brownmap imports analyze/roadmap/reconstruct only; no reverse import
